scoringModel.formula: Final finding score = Severity (0-6) + Impact Evidence (0-2) + Novelty (0-2), capped at 10.

severityTiers.label: S4 Critical
severityTiers.detail: Platform critical, or CVSS 9.0 and above

severityTiers.label: S0 None
severityTiers.detail: Informational only, policy-only, or no verifiable security impact

impactEvidence.detail: Exploit path, affected asset or data, and real-world consequence are clearly evidenced
Impact evidence is partial or incomplete

students.name: Tutorial 14 Group 1
students.notes: Affected organizations and technical details are withheld because the issues are not fixed yet. Reports were submitted via HKCERT.

findings.title: Sensitive data storage disclosure reported via HKCERT (case A)
findings.severityRationale: CVSS above 9, sensitive data in storage, confirmed zero-day, and not fixed yet.
findings.evidenceNote: Affected organization and technical details withheld pending remediation.
findings.scoreReason: Critical disclosure scored from CVSS above 9, sensitive data in storage, privately verified impact evidence, and confirmed zero-day status. Details are withheld because remediation is still pending.

findings.title: Sensitive data storage disclosure reported via HKCERT (case B)
findings.severityRationale: CVSS above 9, sensitive data in storage, confirmed zero-day, and not fixed yet.
findings.evidenceNote: Affected organization and technical details withheld pending remediation.
findings.scoreReason: Critical disclosure scored from CVSS above 9, sensitive data in storage, privately verified impact evidence, and confirmed zero-day status. Details are withheld because remediation is still pending.

students.name: Tutorial 14 Group 2
students.notes: Technical details are withheld. USyd confirmed the disclosure and fixed the issue.

findings.title: USyd access control disclosure confirmed and fixed
findings.program: University of Sydney, technical details withheld pending approval
findings.severityRationale: Sensitive personal information exposure, confirmed and fixed by USyd; technical details withheld.
findings.evidenceNote: Scored under privacy-sensitive disclosure logic; technical details withheld.
findings.scoreReason: High-severity access control disclosure with strong impact evidence from sensitive personal information exposure, USyd confirmation, and fix. Technical details are withheld pending approval, and novelty is treated as a confirmed zero-day.

students.name: Tutorial 4 Group 2
students.notes: External platform report is a confirmed duplicate and currently treated as a validated non-zero-day finding.

findings.title: DoorDash Android deep-link open redirect enables attacker-controlled URL launch
findings.severityRationale: HackerOne duplicate metadata shows High severity (7.7).
findings.evidenceNote: H1 confirmed duplicate of #3410127; earlier duplicate #3640671 predates this submission.
findings.scoreReason: HackerOne triage confirmed the student's report as a duplicate of #3410127. The duplicate metadata shows High severity (7.7), with impact tied to the previously evaluated 0-click account takeover report chain.

students.name: Tutorial 26 Group 5
students.notes: External platform reports are confirmed duplicates and currently treated as non-zero-day findings. Originality review is separate from the duplicate status.

findings.title: Critical authorization bypass in MSCA cold storage allowlist
findings.scoreReason: HackerOne triage confirmed the student's report as a duplicate of #3597643. The platform card shows Critical severity, with strong impact evidence for unauthorized allowlist manipulation.

findings.title: Missing authorization on xReserve withdrawal hooks
findings.scoreReason: HackerOne triage confirmed the student's report as a duplicate of #3506879. The platform card shows High severity, with strong evidence around xReserve withdrawal hook authorization.

findings.title: Naive proposer selection enables Sybil leader capture
findings.scoreReason: HackerOne triage confirmed the student's report as a duplicate of #3665003. The platform card shows High severity, with strong evidence around proposer selection and validator-set manipulation.

findings.title: Stale minters retain minting authority after revocation
findings.evidenceNote: Accepted with H1 duplicate confirmation; PoC screenshot target mismatch noted.
findings.scoreReason: HackerOne triage confirmed the student's report as a duplicate of #3660299. The platform card shows High severity, with strong evidence around stale minting authority after controller revocation.

findings.title: TOCTOU in controller multisig allows mint allowance rebinding
findings.evidenceNote: H1 duplicate confirmation and High severity shown.
findings.scoreReason: HackerOne triage confirmed the student's report as a duplicate of #3523128. The platform card shows High severity, with strong evidence around multisig approval state being rebound at execution time.
